title: Tala Wooden Pepper Mill with Fully Adjustable Ceramic Grinder for Course and fine Milled Pepper, Premium Grade, Perfect for Home, Restaurants and Hotels use, Made with Wood in Red Colour
features: VIBRANT RED WOODEN FINISH: The 150mm Tala pepper mill boasts a bold Red wooden finish, adding a vibrant touch of elegance to your kitchen or dining table
CERAMIC GRINDING MECHANISM: Designed for durability, the Tala mill includes a premium ceramic grinder that ensures long-lasting, rust-free performance

FULLY ADJUSTABLE GRIND SETTINGS: Customise your grind from fine to coarse for perfect seasoning, giving you complete control over your dispensing, This mill can be used for either Salt or Pepper Grinding

VERSATILE DESIGN: Perfect for home or for professional use, This Mill is ideal for Kitchen and table use and perfect for Restaurants and Cafes, the Tala Seasoning mill combines style and practicality for any setting
DURABLE & LONG-LASTING: Tala mills are designed to withstand years of use, making them a smart, reliable investment for both business and personal use
FSC Wood – FSC certified wood. The FSC mark guarantees a sustainable supply chain, with wood from responsibly managed forests
